views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's watering summary, plants needing attention, health overview ring, and quick-add button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal to log a watering or care event for a specific plant with smart defaults based on recent history

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped care log filterable by plant name, care type, and location with color-coded care type badges

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Charts showing watering frequency trends, health ratings over time per plant, care type distribution, and location breakdown with actionable insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayWateringCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of plants watered today across all care types

viewModelComputedProperties.name: plantsWateredToday
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique plant names that received care today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyWateringCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total care events logged in the current week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one watering event logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniquePlantCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of unique plants being tracked across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: neglectedPlants
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Plant names whose last watering was more than 7 days ago, sorted by urgency

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageHealthRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean health rating across the most recent entry for each unique plant

viewModelComputedProperties.name: healthTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Compares average health rating this week vs last week: improving, declining, or stable

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostCaredPlant
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Plant name with the highest number of care entries in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: careTypeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Distribution of care types (watering, misting, etc.) as label-count pairs for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily watering counts for the past 7 days as date-value pairs for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily watering goal completed (todayWateringCount / dailyGoal), clamped 0-1

viewModelComputedProperties.name: plantHealthMap
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Each unique plant paired with its most recent health rating for health overview grid

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: neglected plant alerts, streak celebrations, health warnings, fertilizer reminders

dailyGoal.description: Target number of plants to check and water per day, encourages consistent daily plant rounds

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one watering-type care event (watering or misting) is logged. Fertilizing, pruning, and repotting do not count toward the streak since they are infrequent tasks.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track weekly average watering count vs previous week (volume trend), average health rating this week vs last week (health trend), and per-plant watering frequency to detect neglected plants (any plant with no watering entry in 7+ days triggers an alert).
insights: Neglected plant alert: '{plantName} hasn't been watered in {days} days' when last watering exceeds 7 days
Streak celebration: 'Amazing! {streak}-day green thumb streak!' at 7, 14, 30, 60, 90 day milestones
Health warning: '{plantName} health declining — rated {rating}/5, down from {previous}' when latest health rating drops 2+ points from 30-day average
Fertilizer reminder: 'Consider fertilizing {plantName} — last fertilized {days} days ago' when no fertilize entry in 30+ days
Consistency insight: 'You watered {percent}% more plants this week vs last week' comparing weekly totals
Top performer: '{plantName} is thriving at {rating}/5 health!' for plant with highest recent health rating
